title: Bulk RNA-seq Protocol for Astrocytes
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"cvtd7","text":"This protocol aims to extract total RNA from astrocytes for subsequent bulk RNA sequencing, enabling the analysis of gene expression profiles.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"3fgjq","text":"Handle all reagents and samples with care to avoid exposure to harmful substances. Use appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) including gloves and lab coats.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text:
{"blocks":[{"key":"8h34s","text":"TrypLE Express (Enzyme for cell dissociation) - 10 mL
PBS (Phosphate Buffered Saline) (Ice-cold solution for cell collection) - 50 mL
RLT Lysis Buffer (Qiagen RNeasy kit component) - 1 mL
Qiagen RNeasy Kit (RNA extraction kit) - 1 kit
Liquid Nitrogen (For cell freezing) - As needed

Reagents:
Enzyme TrypLE Express - A recombinant enzyme for cell dissociation
Buffer RLT Lysis Buffer - Buffer for lysing cells to extract RNA","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Extract total RNA using the Qiagen RNeasy kit.
Add 300µL of RLT lysis buffer to the pelleted cells
Quantify RNA using a Nanodrop or similar device and assess RNA quality
Submit 1 µg of total RNA to Azenta/GENEWIZ for library preparation and sequencing.
2. Scrape cells directly into ice-cold PBS (50 mL).
Centrifuge the scraped cells at 1,000 × g for 5 minutes at 4 °C.
Proceed with the Qiagen RNeasy kit protocol for RNA following the manufacturer's instructions
Standard Illumina-compatible library preparation, single indexing
Illlumina HiSeq platform. Paired-end, 150 bp reads
Pseudo-align FASTQ files to reference genome GRCh38.p13 using kallisto
Differential expression analysis with edgeR in R (v2023.12.0+369)
Visualization and functional enrichment with ggplot2 and clusterProfiler
creator: Elena Coccia
